Package global.thalion.ttio.codecs

Class FqzcompNx16Z

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.codecs.FqzcompNx16Z
public final class FqzcompNx16Z extends Object
FQZCOMP_NX16.Z — CRAM-mimic (rANS-Nx16) lossless quality codec (M94.Z).

Clean-room Java port of the Python reference at python/src/ttio/codecs/fqzcomp_nx16_z.py. Spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-m94z-cram-mimic-design.md.

Algorithm summary:

  • L = 2^15 = 32 768 state lower bound.
  • B = 16-bit renormalisation chunks (b = 2^16 = 65 536, b·L = 2^31).
  • N = 4 interleaved rANS states (round-robin by symbol index).
  • T = 4096 = 2^12 fixed total per-context (CRAM-Nx16 discipline: static-per-block freq tables, built once in pass 1, held constant in pass 2).
  • Bit-packed CRAM-style context: 12-bit prev-q ring (3 × 4-bit window) | 2-bit position bucket | 1-bit revcomp.

Wire format magic is M94Z, distinct from M94 v1's FQZN. This is an independent codec. M94 v1 fixtures stay valid; M94.Z fixtures are unrelated bytes. Both codecs exist side by side in the codebase.

Cross-language equivalents:

  • Python: ttio.codecs.fqzcomp_nx16_z
  • Cython: ttio.codecs._fqzcomp_nx16_z._fqzcomp_nx16_z

    M94.Z V4 wire-format version: CRAM 3.1 fqzcomp port (Stage 2/3).

    X_MAX_PREFACTOR
    (L >> T_BITS) << B_BITS = 2^19 = 524 288 — exact since T | b·L.

  • Method Details

    • getBackendName

      public static String getBackendName()
      Reports which rANS backend will service encode/decode calls in the current JVM.

      Returns one of:

      • "native-avx2", "native-sse4.1", or "native-scalar" when libttio_rans_jni is loaded — the suffix is the kernel selected by CPUID dispatch.
      • "native" as a defensive fallback if the library loaded but kernel introspection fails.
      • "pure-java" when the JNI library is not on java.library.path; the Java codec uses its built-in Rans backend.

      Backend selection only affects V2 (native-body) dispatch — see FqzcompNx16Z.EncodeOptions.preferNative(boolean) or the TTIO_M94Z_USE_NATIVE environment variable. V1 encode/decode always uses pure-Java for both paths.

    • packContextParams

      public static byte[] packContextParams(FqzcompNx16Z.ContextParams p)

    • unpackContextParams

      public static FqzcompNx16Z.ContextParams unpackContextParams(byte[] blob, int off)

    • positionBucketPbits

      public static int positionBucketPbits(int position, int readLength, int pbits)
      Position bucket per spec §4.2: min(2^pbits - 1, (pos * 2^pbits) // read_length).
